title: viburnum triphyllum f. macrophyllum
intro: Viburnum triphyllum f. macrophyllum, also known as Large-leaf Sweet Viburnum, is a variety of the Viburnum triphyllum plant, a flowering shrub native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viburnum triphyllum f. macrophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, making it useful in treating various ailments such as colds, flu, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
